title: 30 Official Release date for reals
wikitext:
[]: 3.0 Official Release date for reals?             Quote Post by monochromatic414 » Sun Oct 30, 2011 10:08 pm Was perusing through the internets this evening when I should have been writing a paper, and found on the Rebuild Wikipedia page a reference link that established 3.0's release date as fall of 2012, same time as Final 4.0 Linkage: http://www.evangelion.co.jp/q.html Apparently this website was updated a few days ago...10.24.2011 I'm probably not the first person to post this, but I didn't feel like sifting through other forum pages that are 100's of pages long. Forgive my excitedness! Thoughts?

[]: A bit slow on the news. Bl             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Sun Oct 30, 2011 10:17 pm You missed this , didn't you? As always, the Search function's your friend, but it also doesn't hurt to check the main page for news updates.

[]: Re: 3.0 Official Release date for reals?             Quote Post by symbv » Mon Oct 31, 2011 2:17 am monochromatic414 wrote: Was perusing through the internets this evening when I should have been writing a paper, and found on the Rebuild Wikipedia page a reference link that established 3.0's release date as fall of 2012, same time as Final 4.0 Linkage: http://www.evangelion.co.jp/q.html

[]: Re: 3.0 Official Release date for reals?             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Oct 31, 2011 5:48 am symbv wrote: The link above did not say anything about Final 4.0, so where did you get the info about the Final 4.0 release date ?

[]: Re: 3.0 Official Release date for reals?             Quote Post by symbv » Mon Oct 31, 2011 6:14 am The Eva Monkey wrote: The production originally stated that Final was going to be screened alongside 3.0, which would make sense with how long it's taking.

[]:             Quote Post by Viking » Mon Oct 31, 2011 6:35 am Anything is possible, but BTW as far as I remember Wikipedia always stated that Rebuild 3.0 & 4.0 release date would have been the same... in 2010. Sure something has changed in the meantime. Bye

[]:             Quote Post by Sharkface » Mon Oct 31, 2011 7:34 am As much as I'd love for the rebuild to come out and be done with so that I'm not 25 and still waiting for anime movies- I still am against the idea of Anno scrapping the final two chapters in as a double features. I want two more movies that run at almost two hours. Seriously. It sounds like a shallow request, but for all that they've made us wait through, we better get a ton of the most amazing content ever known to anime theatrics. The question is if they'll throw some sort of Easter egg or teaser in after the credits. But this is Japanese media, not cheap thrills American theatrics.

[]: Re: 3.0 Official Release date for reals?             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Oct 31, 2011 7:59 am symbv wrote: I thought it was a rumor but there was official information that the Final will go at the same time as 3.0 ?

[]: !             Quote Post by fearlubu » Tue Nov 01, 2011 2:36 am well these online retail sites tend to have placeholder dates for unconfirmed release dates. doubt that the october 2012 thing means too much

[]:             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Wed Nov 02, 2011 3:37 pm Call me picky but I would hate to have 3.0 and 4.0 together just because of what the cover would be like. Would it have something like Evangelion 3.0/4.0(/FINAL) on it? Or just Evangelion 3.0? It really bugs me.

[]:             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Thu Nov 03, 2011 2:28 am I want 2 more movies. Because more is better. MOOOOOORE.

[]:             Quote Post by ReiAyanami25 » Thu Nov 03, 2011 2:37 am Fazmotron wrote: I want 2 more movies. Because more is better. MOOOOOORE.

[]:             Quote Post by Final Messenger » Thu Nov 03, 2011 8:02 am I would love two movies but I don’t want to wait three years for the ending. So as I stand right now I want them shown together.

[]:             Quote Post by Warren Peace » Thu Nov 03, 2011 4:04 pm I want 3.0, Final... and then 5.0 (Final2 True)

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Nov 07, 2011 8:06 pm I wonder how likely it would be for 3.0 to be released Fall 2012 with 4.0 being released Spring or Summer 2013? (Think Death & EoE's releases being a few months apart.) Assuming 3.0 and 4.0 aren't merged into one film, but at least being worked on back to back.

[]:             Quote Post by bladerj » Mon Nov 07, 2011 8:46 pm Fazmotron wrote: I want 2 more movies. Because more is better. MOOOOOORE.

[]:             Quote Post by Stryker » Mon Nov 07, 2011 9:21 pm I agree with bladerj, despite the fact that people have such small attention spans that they wouldn't care if it wasn't a movie series.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Tue Nov 08, 2011 1:05 am I don't buy that. Eva is Eva. If a new TV run were to be announced, people would watch the hell out of it, and probably not just loser otaku, either. Rebuild 2.22's box office receipts should by themselves show proof that Eva has enormous mainstream appeal even after all these years. I am in favor of a TV series over films, though, mostly because it wouldn't allow Anno to put himself in a position where he can leave me with an image of Shinji at his most pathetic for more than three years at a time. Even EoE was only what, eighteen months after EoTV? And while I can't say I like EoTV's presentation of Shinji, he's far more tolerable than ReShinji "Grumpypants" Gendousson.

[]:             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Thu Nov 10, 2011 4:34 pm Azathoth wrote: Rebuild 2.22's box office receipts should by themselves show proof that Eva has enormous mainstream appeal even after all these years.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Thu Nov 10, 2011 4:58 pm On /a/, it's "hipster" to watch anything that isn't Currently Airing Cute-Girls-Doing-Cute-Things!! Season 2, because /a/ is chiefly composed of small children who don't understand words and twentysomething shut-ins who haven't been outside since before modern hipsterdom came to exist.
